arts.ttl: Harry Kane becomes the fastest player to score 50 goals in the Bundesliga
arts.sum: Kane scored 36 goals in 32 league appearances last season, his first for Bayern after joining from Tottenham. Harry Kane is the quickest player to score 50 goals in the Bundesliga after scoring a hat trick on his 43rd appearance on Friday.

arts.ttl: Match Awards from FC Bayern’s strong-ish 3-0 win over FC Augsburg
arts.sum: The Augsburg and Croatian goalkeeper was essential to FC Augsburg’s defense today, despite conceding an eventual three goals to Bayern Munich . Labrovic put in a stellar performance between the posts tonight, making eleven different saves, which is no small feat.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane tops Erling Haaland, fastest to 50 Bundesliga goals
arts.sum: Bayern had possession and chances, but the visitors defended resolutely with Augsburg goalkeeper Nediljko Labrović denying Kane, then twice Jamal Musiala to keep the game scoreless at half-time. Harry Kane became the fastest player to reach 50 Bundesliga goals, eclipsing previous record-holder Erling Haaland, with a hat trick in Bayern Munich's 3-0 win over Augsburg on Friday.

arts.ttl: Kane hat trick against Augsburg hides Bayern's concerning lack of goals
arts.sum: Bayern had possession and chances, but the visitors defended resolutely with Augsburg goalkeeper Nediljko Labrović denying Kane, then twice Jamal Musiala to keep the game scoreless at halftime. Harry Kane scored a hat trick including two penalties for Bayern Munich to beat Augsburg 3-0 in the Bundesliga on Friday.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane's hat-trick powers Bayern Munich to dominant win over Augsburg
arts.sum: The encounter, which began under challenging conditions, saw Harry Kane emerge as the hero with a second-half hat-trick that broke Augsburg's stubborn resistance. Harry Kane scored another hat-trick as Bayern Munich overpowered a dogged Augsburg side to take all three points in the Matchday 11 opener on Friday.

arts.ttl: Kane hits hat-trick to break Haaland record in Bayern win
arts.sum: Highlights of the Bundesliga match between Bayern Munich and FC Augsburg.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane smashes ANOTHER Bundesliga record
arts.sum: Harry Kane scored his fourth hat-trick of the season as Bayern Munich ran out 3-0 winners against Augsburg, and the Englishman becomes the quickest player to reach 50 goals in…

arts.ttl: Another Kane "Lupenreiner" lifts Bayern over Augsburg
arts.sum: Harry Kane has once again achieved the "flawless German hat trick" in another win for first-place FC Bayern München. A 3-0 victory over visiting Augsburg solidifies a commanding lead for Bayern at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Report: French club confirms Bayern Munich’s interest in reliable scorer
arts.sum: With no transfer fee requirement, Jonathan David is a very compelling option for Bayern next summer. In a podcast with RMC Sport, Lille boss Olivier Létang has now confirmed our exclusive news that FC Bayern are interested in Jonathan David and are one of many clubs in Europe keeping tabs on the 24 y/o striker.

arts.ttl: Spoiler alert? Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala settles into villa as contract talks loom
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala has moved to Philipp Lahm’s villa in the upscale area of Bogenhausen in Munich, a 20-minute drive away from Säbener Straße. The Germany international has just moved into Philipp Lahm’s villa per Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).
